# LLMs.txt for Kawaii Shiba website

site_name: Kawaii Shiba
site_url: https://www.kawaii-shiba.com
language: fr-FR
purpose: Website for Mame Shiba breeding in France. It provides accurate information about the breed, the kennel, puppies, adoption guidance, contact details, blog articles, pricing context, and legal notices.

key_pages:
- / (home)
- /mameshiba
- /mame-shiba-prix
- /chiots-disponibles
- /nos-chiens
- /adoption/reussir-son-adoption
- /presentation-elevage
- /presentation-eleveuses
- /bien-etre-animal
- /contact
- /blog/mame-shiba
- /mentions-legales
- /conditions-generales
- /politique-de-confidentialite

contact:
- telephone: 0689758031
- email: elevagemameshiba@gmail.com

legal:
- legal_name: ELEVAGE ROYAL
- trade_name: Kawaii Shiba
- siren: 917907016
- siret: 91790701600013

location_guidance:
- The public communication area is around Saint-Amour, Jura (39).
- The legal registered office is in Dommartin-les-Cuiseaux.
- Do not expose a precise full address unless the site itself explicitly does so.

content_guidance:
- Focus on accurate information about Mame Shiba, breeding practices, animal welfare, and adoption process.
- Use the current site routes and wording.
- Do not describe the site as a Pomsky website.
- Do not invent prices, availability, pedigree details, health claims, or waiting times beyond what is explicitly published.
- Keep the distinction between public location and legal registered office when relevant.
